expectations.text: A config.yaml was created under projects/website-redesign/ with the correct plan_id and group_id
expectations.evidence: projects/website-redesign/config.yaml exists with plan_id: plan-abc123, group_id: grp-xyz456

expectations.text: The agent conducted an interview asking about scope, goals, milestones, risks, and stakeholders before writing documents
expectations.evidence: Transcript confirms all 9 interview areas covered before any files were written

expectations.text: At least 10 of 15 documents were created with real content (not just empty stubs)
expectations.evidence: 12 of 15 docs fully populated; 3 are stubs (change-requests, lessons-learned, meeting-notes) which is correct per the skill

expectations.text: The project was registered in projects/index.yaml
expectations.evidence: projects/index.yaml contains entry for website-redesign with correct plan_id and group_id

expectations.text: A connection validation step was attempted (tasks list or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Agent simulated tasks list call and reported result to user
